name: python3-libmsiecf
title: python3-libmsiecf
summary: Microsoft Internet Explorer Cache File access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
Microsoft Internet Explorer Cache File access library -- Python 3 bindings
libmsiecf is a library to access the Microsoft Internet Explorer
(MSIE) Cache File (index.dat) files.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libmsiecf.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libmsiecf because Microsoft Internet Explorer Cache File access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libmsiecf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libmsiecf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libmsiecf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
